videos.headline: Jackson Arnold connects with Bauer Sharp for a Sooners TD
videos.description: Jackson Arnold rolls to his right and finds Bauer Sharp to give Oklahoma a 7-0 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jackson Arnold connects with Bauer Sharp for a Sooners TD) 2024/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jackson Arnold throws 2nd TD of the 1st quarter
videos.description: Jackson Arnold hits Deion Burks in the end zone for a 14-0 Sooners lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jackson Arnold throws 2nd TD of the 1st quarter) 2024/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oklahoma's Kani Walker picks off Forrest Brock on a tipped pass
videos.description: Kendel Dolby breaks up a pass by tipping it in the air and Kani Walker comes down with it for the Sooners.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Oklahoma’s Kani Walker picks off Forrest Brock on a tipped pass) 2024/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Deion Burks comes down with his 2nd TD for OU
videos.description: Jackson Arnold throws a touchdown to Deion Burks to extend Oklahoma's lead over Temple.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Deion Burks comes down with his 2nd TD for OU) 2024/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: A Temple fumble leads to an easy Oklahoma TD
videos.description: After Oklahoma recovers a Temple fumble, Jackson Arnold and Deion Burks connect for their third touchdown in the first half.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (A Temple fumble leads to an easy Oklahoma TD) 2024/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jaren Kanak gets the scoop-and-score TD for Oklahoma
videos.description: After a fumble on a punt return from Dante Wright, Jaren Kanak picks it up and takes it to the house for the Sooners.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jaren Kanak gets the scoop-and-score TD for Oklahoma) 2024/08/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Oklahoma's Taylor Tatum walks into the end zone for a TD
videos.description: Taylor Tatum goes unblocked into the end zone for another Sooners touchdown.
